changes: Fixed a bug where you could restart the engine prematurely while the vehicle is crashing.
Replaced the race finished event with a better experience.
Added different transmission types for automatic, and true manual.
Manual now is no longer just a manual shift. You control the clutch and when to shift, and you also handle stalling. There is now engine stalling in manual if engine rpm drops below idle.
Automatic vehicles have different transmission behaviors, for example ATC is different than CVT.
Vehicles can define shift-on-demand in automatic mode, which allows the user to enable manual shifting. This is closer to the previous manual experience.
serverChanges: Updated race finished event to carry time and other information.
